summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls, a mounted steer head and cowboy boots displayed on wall shelves behind him. He wears a white dress shirt with a clip-on microphone and speaks directly to camera, gesturing. Burned-in caption subtitles appear at the bottom (for example 'OUR ADVERSARIES ARE NOT BUT'). The audio is him describing his role overseeing the agencies under DHS and recent ICE arrests. No music bed.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt with lapel mic speaks to camera; mounted steer head and cowboy boots on shelves behind him; caption 'OUR ADVERSARIES ARE NOT BUT.'
